chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.08 of 2016 [M/s. Ravian Business Machines (Pvt.) Ltd. & others Vs. M/s. IGI Investment Bank Limited] DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing Case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.966/2024 (Discharge of vakalatnama). 2. For order on CMA No.3675/2019 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.3676/2019 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 07.05.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ajmal Awan Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Naeem Suleman, Advocate for the appellants. Mr. Ghulam Ahmed, Advocate for the respondent..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This is the First Appeal pending since 2016 against the judgment and decree of the Banking Court passed in Suit No.307/2012. The counsel representing the appellants has filed an application for the discharge of vakalatnama, the reasons are disclosed in the application and the affidavit in support thereof. Attached with it, is a notice of withdrawal of vakalatnama issued to the appellants and no one has responded on their behalf. It is a date by Court matter as on the last date i.e. 25.04.2024 the counsel for the appellants appeared and pointed out to the pendency of the application. Notice was directly issued to the appellants as recorded by the office. It seems that the appellants have lost interest in pursuing this matter. The appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
